TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jon_Abrahams, title = Jon_Abrahams, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jon_Abrahams} }

S.FORM: Jon Abrahams kawas tay 1977, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 10, Jon Abrahams, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Jon Abrahams kawas tay 1977, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 10, Jon Abrahams, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *on aβraħams~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *on aβraħams~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
